diagrams.title: Business Case Components Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the structure and flow of a business case document from problem statement to recommendations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the structure and logical flow of business case content

diagrams.title: NPV Calculation Process
diagrams.description: Illustrates how Net Present Value is calculated by discounting future cash flows
elements: NPV = Sum of PV - Initial Investment
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the time value of money in project investment decisions

diagrams.title: Feasibility Assessment Framework
diagrams.description: Five dimensions of feasibility study with key questions for each type
diagrams.purpose: Ensuring all aspects of project viability are evaluated before approval

diagrams.title: SWOT Analysis Matrix
diagrams.description: 4-quadrant matrix for strategic analysis of projects
diagrams.purpose: Analyzing internal capabilities and external environment for informed decision-making
